fr:mainmatter.fr:p: To construct an element of \mathchoice {\textstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\textstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\scriptstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\scriptscriptstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}Bx, it suffices to construct an element of A\to \mathchoice {\textstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\textstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\scriptstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\scriptscriptstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}Bx. In particular, we take f\colon A\to \mathchoice {\textstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\textstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\scriptstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\scriptscriptstyle \prod _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}Bx to \lambda {x}\mathpunct {.}fxx.
